# ministr

> ministr is a local, MIT-licensed code intelligence MCP server. It gives AI
> coding agents AST-level understanding of a codebase — semantic search across
> code and docs, symbol navigation, real reference graphs, and cross-language
> bridge detection — running and embedding entirely on the user's machine.

## Getting started

- [Installation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/getting-started/installation.md): install the CLI from source
- [Quickstart](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/getting-started/quickstart.md): point ministr at a project and connect an agent
- [Client setup](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/getting-started/client-setup.md): Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code / Copilot, generic MCP, steering, headless

## Guides

- [Configuration](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/guides/configuration.md): .ministr.toml and the global config, in full
- [The desktop app](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/guides/desktop-app.md): the visual project and index manager
- [Headless and CI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/guides/headless-and-ci.md): scripted agent runs and the allowlist gotcha
- [Recorded execution](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/guides/recorded-execution.md): the ministr_run family

## Reference

- [Tool reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/reference/tools/README.md): the MCP tool surface, generated from the live schemas
- [CLI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/reference/cli.md): every ministr subcommand and flag
- [Daemon HTTP API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/reference/http-api.md): routes served to local clients

## Concepts

- [Architecture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/concepts/architecture.md): the crates, the shared daemon, the open-core seam
- [Indexing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/concepts/indexing.md): how a repo becomes documents, sections, claims, and symbols
- [Search](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/concepts/search.md): what ministr_survey actually does
- [Cross-language bridges](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/concepts/bridges.md): linking calls across language boundaries
- [Freshness](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/concepts/freshness.md): the hash-verified up-to-date contract
- [Sessions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/docs/concepts/sessions.md): dedup, delta delivery, and honest accounting

## Optional

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/README.md): project overview and install one-liner
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup, architecture overview, quality gates
- [CHANGELOG](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/OlsonSoftware/ministr/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history
